nasb.text: Just as many were astonished at you, My people, So His appearance was marred more than any man And His form more than the sons of men.

esv.text: As many were astonished at you— his appearance was so marred, beyond human semblance, and his form beyond that of the children of mankind—

cnv.text: 許多人怎樣因你而驚奇， （因為他的容貌毀損得不像人， 他的形狀毀損得不像世人），

ccb.text: 许多人看见祂就诧异， 祂的面容被毁、身体被残害得不成人样。

csbs.text: 多人怎样因他震惊 ——他的容貌被毁得不像人， 他的形体被毁得不像人类——
